customer_name.evidence: Agent: Very good afternoon, Anil baat kar raha hoon sir HDFC Life se. How are you? Customer: Hmm, aap batao. ... Agent: Batana chahunga HDFC Life ne na guaranteed plan design kiya hai sir. ... Customer: Kisne design kiya hai? ... Agent: Sir HDFC Life Insurance department se baat kar raha hoon sir main. Customer: Aapne design kiya hai sir jo insurance wala hai? Agent: Ji insurance branch se baat kar raha hoon sir. Zahir si baat hai sir. ... Customer: 35 saal. ... Agent: Theek hai. Is mein apna by profession kya job karte hain, business karte hain khud ka? Customer: Main job karta hoon sir, construction line mein. ... Customer: Delhi se. ... Agent: Delhi se baat kar rahe hain, theek hai. Baaki sir main bhi aapse sir Delhi se hi baat kar raha hoon apna Noida branch se. ... Customer: 6 lakh rupaye yearly maan lo. ... Agent: 1 lakh ke according comfortable rahega? ... Customer: Theek hai. ... Customer: Nahi, maine aisa kuch nahi kiya. Maine SBI mein hi apna medical kara rakha hai insurance ka. ... Customer: Aajkal sir koi banda 100 saal tak jiyega? Agent 2: Hello. Agent 2: Hello. Hi sir, good afternoon. Main aapse Milan baat kar raha hoon HDFC Life company ke bihaf se.

state.evidence: Agent: Baaki sir main bhi aapse sir Delhi se hi baat kar raha hoon apna Noida branch se.

occupation.evidence: Customer: Main job karta hoon sir, construction line mein.

occupation_detail.evidence: Customer: Main job karta hoon sir, construction line mein.

income_band_inr.evidence: Customer: 6 lakh rupaye yearly maan lo.

objections.quote: Aajkal sir koi banda 100 saal tak jiyega?

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Agent: 1 lakh ke according comfortable rahega? Customer: Theek hai.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Ghar mein chal rahi hai, bank mein chal rahi hai, bas jo bachta hai daal dete hain.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: Batana chahunga HDFC Life ne na guaranteed plan design kiya hai sir.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Theek hai. (Agreeing to the 1 lakh premium suggestion)

agent_promises: 36% guaranteed income from first year for whole life

missed_opportunities: Did not explore the customer's existing health insurance coverage in more detail for cross-sell.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is open to hearing about the plan but skeptical about the 100-year benefit duration.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced himself as being from HDFC Life and immediately pitched a guaranteed income plan.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was passive but cooperative, providing details when asked and questioning the logic of a 100-year plan.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer questioned the feasibility of a 100-year plan, leading to a second agent taking over the call to explain the product.
call_narrative.ending: The call was interrupted by a second agent taking over the pitch, and it ended abruptly while the second agent was speaking.

key_quotes: Aajkal sir koi banda 100 saal tak jiyega?
Ghar mein chal rahi hai, bank mein chal rahi hai, bas jo bachta hai daal dete hain.
